sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint requires exact-once SMS continuation grants but does not serialize the concrete grant lifetime, resend budget, or replacement behavior.
decisionTaken: Freeze continuation grants to a 20 minute default TTL, allow at most two resends per call session, and require each resend to issue a fresh AccessGrant plus AccessGrantSupersessionRecord for the prior link.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The decision keeps grants short-lived, opaque, and canonical while proving old links cannot remain silently live after replacement.
operationalRisk: Too short a TTL can increase support contacts; too long a TTL increases wrong-recipient and stale-fence exposure.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Revise phase2-telephony-continuation-lifetime-resend-192.v1 and regenerate the eligibility, replay, and recovery matrices before changing runtime defaults.
